channel.title: GitHub Copilot Model Updates
channel.description: Notifications about changes to GitHub Copilot models including new models, removed models, and multiplier changes.

item.title: Model Update: 2026-04-17
item.description: • **New model added**: Claude Opus 4.7 (Provider: Anthropic), Multiplier: 7.5

item.title: Model Update: 2026-04-02
item.description:
• **Model removed**: GPT-5.1-Codex
  • **Model removed**: GPT-5.1-Codex-Max
  • **Model removed**: GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini
  • **GPT-5.1**: Release status changed from 'Closing down: 2026-04-01' to 'Closing down: 2026-04-15'

item.title: Model Update: 2026-03-27
item.description:
• **Model removed**: Gemini 3 Pro
  • **GPT-5.1**: Release status changed from 'GA' to 'Closing down: 2026-04-01'
  • **GPT-5.1-Codex**: Release status changed from 'GA' to 'Closing down: 2026-04-01'
  • **GPT-5.1-Codex-Max**: Release status changed from 'GA' to 'Closing down: 2026-04-01'
  • **GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini**: Release status changed from 'Public preview' to 'Closing down: 2026-04-01'

item.title: Model Update: 2026-03-18
item.description: • **New model added**: GPT-5.4 mini (Provider: OpenAI), Multiplier: 0.33

item.title: Model Update: 2026-03-06
item.description:
• **New model added**: GPT-5.4 (Provider: OpenAI), Multiplier: 1
  • **Grok Code Fast 1**: Multiplier (free) changed from 'Not applicable' to '1'

item.title: Model Update: 2026-03-03
item.description:
• **Claude Haiku 4.5**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0.33'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to '1'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Claude Opus 4.5**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '3'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Claude Opus 4.6**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '3'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) (preview)**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '30'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'
  • **Claude Sonnet 4**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Claude Sonnet 4.5**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Claude Sonnet 4.6**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-4.1**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to '1'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5 mini**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to '1'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5.1**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5.1-Codex**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5.1-Codex-Max**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0.33'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'
  • **GPT-5.2**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5.2-Codex**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **GPT-5.3-Codex**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Gemini 2.5 Pro**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Gemini 3 Flash**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0.33'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'
  • **Gemini 3 Pro**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'
  • **Gemini 3.1 Pro**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '1'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'
  • **Goldeneye**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to '1'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'
  • **Grok Code Fast 1**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0.25'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to 'Not applicable'; Release status changed from '' to 'GA'
  • **Raptor mini**: Multiplier (paid) changed from '' to '0'; Multiplier (free) changed from '' to '1'; Release status changed from '' to 'Public preview'

item.title: Model Update: 2026-03-03
item.description:
• **New model added**: Claude Haiku 4.5 (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: Claude Opus 4.5 (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: Claude Opus 4.6 (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) (preview) (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: Claude Sonnet 4 (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Provider: Anthropic)
  • **New model added**: GPT-4.1 (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5 mini (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.1 (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.1-Codex (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.1-Codex-Max (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.2 (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.2-Codex (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: GPT-5.3-Codex (Provider: OpenAI)
  • **New model added**: Gemini 2.5 Pro (Provider: Google)
  • **New model added**: Gemini 3 Flash (Provider: Google)
  • **New model added**: Gemini 3 Pro (Provider: Google)
  • **New model added**: Gemini 3.1 Pro (Provider: Google)
  • **New model added**: Goldeneye (Provider: Microsoft)
  • **New model added**: Grok Code Fast 1 (Provider: xAI)
  • **New model added**: Raptor mini (Provider: Microsoft)
